title_fr: Un blocus ferme le poste frontalier de Coutts
description_en: A blockade at the Coutts, Alberta border crossing begins alongside wider convoy protests, disrupting a major Canada-US trade route. Note: the $44M/day figure in reporting refers to the per-day trade value at that crossing, not a total blockade cost.
verification_notes: Verified against R-022 (Calgary Herald): blockade closes Coutts crossing, protest against COVID-19 health measures. Note: $44M/day is a per-day cross-border trade figure, not total cost — do not present as cost of the blockade.
